s1.ptxt: Connect SUZUKI scan tool to DLC (1) located around bottom of instrument panel on driver’s seat side.
Read DTC according to the instructions displayed on SUZUKI scan tool. For further details, refer to operator’s manual for SUZUKI scan tool.

attention3.ptxt: If communication between SUZUKI scan tool and P/S control module is not possible, check the following points for recovery.

item.ptxt: SUZUKI scan tool and communication cable
DLC power circuit and ground circuit
CAN communication system malfunction (“Control Module Communication Bus Off” is detected in any control module)

s1.ptxt: Set ignition “OFF” and disconnect SUZUKI scan tool from DLC.
